title: Whole-Project Olares Migration Governance Alignment Execution
objective: Align the active Olares governance surfaces around the clarified program directive that all Apex Ops work top to bottom must converge on Olares-resident governance and execution, with the laptop reduced to a client-only risk surface.
execution_summary: Packet 083 updates the active Olares authority, cutover baselines, PM cockpit, status, roadmap, and routing surfaces so whole-project Apex Ops migration to Olares is the governing frame rather than a bounded support-lane convenience posture.
selected_scope_note: This execution is governance and framing alignment only. It does not change GitHub canonical status, install surfaces, runtime or service posture, auth boundaries, or the current transitional publication boundary.
next_packet_candidate: No automatic successor; open the next Olares packet only for a concrete migration dependency, publication-boundary retirement step, or other real split-residency friction.
sql_permission_note: This execution packet authorizes no database writes, no source/test runtime mutation, no package or lockfile mutation, no installs, no runtime or service mutation, no AI-services expansion, no remote rewrite, no rollback or force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation.
